display_name: ClawdContext — Markdown OS for AI Agents

critical_findings.description: Webview panel with scripts enabled (potential C2 channel)

high_findings.code_snippet: - S06: Security: no fetch(), no process.env, no eval(), no credential access.
- Scoped exceptions: "Never use eval()" + "Use eval() only in the REPL module for user expressions"
* Works entirely with Node.js child_process (no git SDK dependency).
const output = child_process.execFileSync('git', ['ls-tree', '-r', '--name-only', ref], { cwd, encoding: 'utf8', stdio: ['pipe', 'pipe', 'pipe'], maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024 });
const output = child_process.execFileSync('git', ['log', '--oneline', '-10', '--format=%h|%s'], { cwd, encoding: 'utf8', stdio: ['pipe', 'pipe', 'pipe'] });

medium_findings.description: Publisher 'clawdcontext' does not match GitHub org 'yaamwebsolutions' in repo 'https://github.com/yaamwebsolutions/clawdcontext4vscode'

medium_findings.code_snippet: const panel = vscode.window.createWebviewPanel('clawdcontextDashboard', 'ClawdContext Dashboard', vscode.ViewColumn.One, { enableScripts: true });

medium_findings.description: Publisher domain is NOT verified by Microsoft

info_findings.description: No domain associated with publisher profile
